fields.customfield_10250:
[*Project Status (For All)*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype not in (Bug, "Development Bug", Consult) AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "" OR fixVersion in ()) ORDER BY issuetype DESC, priority DESC]
[*All Bugs (For All)*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, "Development Bug") AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "")]
[*Escaped Bugs from RnD (For All)*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, "Development Bug") AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV")  AND (creator not in membersOf(dg-gps-rnd-prod-s)) AND (resolution in (Done) AND (fixVersion is not EMPTY AND fixversion not in (UNKNOWN,NONE))) AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "")]
[*All Consults (For All)*| https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Consult) AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND  resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "")]
[*Task Requester Check (For TR)*| https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, 'Development Bug', Consult) AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND  resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "") AND (labels not in (TR_Checked) OR labels is EMPTY) ]
[*Bugs Fixing Priority (For ESD)*| https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in  (Bug, 'Development Bug', Consult) AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND  resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "") AND status not in (Developed, 'For Testing', 'In Testing') ORDER BY priority DESC]
[*Check Severity (For QA)*|  https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, 'Development Bug') AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "") AND severity not in ('S1 Blocker', 'S2 Critical', 'S3 Major', 'S4 Minor', 'S5 Trivial', 'S6 Not a bug') ]
[*Check Escaped Bugs from RnD (For QA)*| https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, 'Development Bug') AND (creator not in membersOf(dg-gps-rnd-prod-s)) AND (resolution in (Done) AND (fixVersion is not EMPTY AND fixversion not in (UNKNOWN,NONE))) AND project in ("FMBP", "FACTORYT","CONF", "GNFP", "GFHW", "FM64", "EV") AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "") AND ('QA Labels' not in (ER_Developer_info, ER_Non_QA_conditions, ER_Non_QA_tested, ER_QA_not_detected, ER_Task_Requester_info) OR 'QA Labels' is EMPTY ) ]

fields.customfield_10368:
|| Filter Name || Description ||
| [*Remaining release tickets left*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=(fixVersion in (04.00.00.Rev.366_227) OR issue in linkedIssues(FMBP-52822, "Next Release", "Previous Release", blocks, "is blocked by", clones, "is cloned by", duplicates, "is duplicated by", "relates to")) AND status in ("In Testing", "For Testing", "For Verification", Verifying, "Gathering Information") AND issuetype != Release] | Shows which issues still need to be tested for the current task.|
| [*Release Filter Link*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=(fixVersion in (04.00.00.Rev.366_227) OR affectedVersion in (04.00.00.Rev.366_227) OR ("Affected Version Details" ~ "04.00.00.Rev.366_227*") OR issue in linkedIssues(FMBP-52822, "Next Release", "Previous Release", blocks, "is blocked by", clones, "is cloned by", duplicates, "is duplicated by", "relates to")) AND issuetype not in (Release, Sub-task, "TSK Sub-task") AND NOT (issuetype = Task AND resolution in (Done, Cancelled))] | Shows the current task scope: what should be tested, what was tested, and which problems were registered.|
| [*New/Unresolved Tickets*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=(affectedVersion in (04.00.00.Rev.366_227) OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "04.00.00.Rev.366_227*") AND issuetype in (Bug, "Development Bug", Consult, "User Story") AND resolution = Unresolved] | Shows newly reported issues related to the current task.|
| [*Batch status filter*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=issuetype in (Bug, "Development Bug", Consult) AND resolution = Unresolved AND (affectedVersion in () OR "Affected Version Details" ~ "")] | Shows the full status of a current batch|
| [*Task filter*|https://teltonika-telematics.atlassian.net/issues/?jql=project = FMBP AND fixVersion was in (04.00.00.Rev.366_227)] | Used only for worklog calculation.|

comments.body: [Alp Sezer Orak|https://gps-gitlab.teltonika.lt/alp.orak] mentioned this issue in [a merge request|https://gps-gitlab.teltonika.lt/fleet/fmb/fmb-firmware/-/merge_requests/8412] of [Fleet-management / FMB / fmb-firmware|https://gps-gitlab.teltonika.lt/fleet/fmb/fmb-firmware] on branch [feat/FMBP-52822-bu|https://gps-gitlab.teltonika.lt/fleet/fmb/fmb-firmware/-/tree/feat/FMBP-52822-bu]:{quote}FMBP-52822 feat: base update branch into 04.02.00.Rev.05{quote}

[~accountid:712020:226432e8-64d7-4e97-849a-fb6f7bc69076] 
!image-2025-12-03-07-53-31-924.png!

 

Does this mean this release 04.00.00.Rev.366_227, contain 04.01.00.Rev.12 as well?

 

[~accountid:712020:398883b6-edb1-41ee-aff8-0887578130f2]  FYI
[~accountid:712020:0b0b46ac-990e-4df8-aef4-25b7e5f98fc4] FYI

[~accountid:5bd2ebb5ca472f15b61ed2e7] no, sorry for the confusion

I had cloned this release ticket for another client, and the ticket ID's were mismatched, causing this gitlab comment. Spec 227 is based on 04.00.00.Rev.12. Base update performed on FMBP-49453
